title: Statutory Functions of the Minister for Foreign Affairs and International Relations Order, 2002
title_en: Statutory Functions of the Minister for Foreign Affairs and International Relations Order, 2002

provisions.content: This Order shall have effect during the absence (27 th February 2002 — 10 th March 2002) of the Minister for Foreign Affairs and Inter­national Relations from Dar es Salaam following the publication of this Order.

All the powers, duties and functions conferred or imposed upon the Minister for Foreign Affairs and International Relations shall vest in and be exercised by the Minister for Science, Technology and Higher Education.
